items.text: Give me five blog topics for our product launch.

items.delta:
1. How we built a multi-agent platform in six months
2. Why we bet on open-weight models for our launch
3. The unexpected lessons from our beta program
4. How primer makes your agents observable by default
5. From prototype to production: our infrastructure story

items.text: Nice list. Now switch to the outline editor so we can flesh out topic 3.

items.delta: Good call. The outline editor agent is set up to turn one topic into a structured outline. Use the agent selector below to switch, then ask it to outline topic 3.

items.description: Brainstorms blog post topics for a theme
system_prompt: You suggest sharp, specific blog post topics for a given theme.
Return a numbered list of five. No preamble.

items.description: Turns a chosen topic into a structured outline
system_prompt: You turn a single blog topic into a tight outline: a working title, three to five section headings, and one line under each.
